overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a canoe through a winding river canyon. The journey progresses from a narrow, shadowed gorge with a rope bridge overhead to a wider, sunlit river with forested banks and mild rapids.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with rope bridge overhead

events.description: passing under rock overhang on left canyon wall
approaching rope bridge structure spanning the canyon

agents.ego_description: paddling the canoe steadily downstream through the narrow waterway

entered.detail: wooden rope bridge spanning the canyon gap overhead
steep granite cliff face with sparse vegetation
tall rock formation rising directly from the water
large rock protruding from the river surface
overhanging rock formation creating shadow on the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, shadowed river canyon with steep granite walls on both sides. A rope bridge is visible spanning the canyon ahead. The character paddles the canoe forward, passing under a rock overhang on the left, approaching the bridge structure as the canyon walls loom close on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between canyon and open river valley

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into wider river valley
emerging from shadowed canyon into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: paddling through widening waterway as the canyon opens up

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees covering the hillside beyond the canyon
bright blue sky with scattered white clouds visible overhead

segments.scene_description: The canoe exits the narrow canyon into a wider river valley, with the rope bridge disappearing behind. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sunlight. Pine forests become visible on the left hillside as the canyon walls recede into the distance, creating a more open and expansive environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide forested river valley with calm waters

events.description: navigating around large boulder in the river channel

agents.ego_description: paddling steadily through calm open waters surrounded by forest

entered.detail: gentle sloping riverbank covered in grass and small shrubs
multiple medium-sized rocks scattered throughout the river

segments.scene_description: The river opens into a wide, sunlit valley with calm waters. The left canyon wall has disappeared, replaced by forested banks that now line both sides of the river. The character paddles steadily, maneuvering around scattered rocks in the water, while the right canyon wall fades into the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: river rapids with turbulent white water

events.description: entering rapids section with turbulent white water
water current increases speed through rocky rapids section

agents.ego_description: paddling through rapids, maneuvering around rocks in the turbulent water

entered.detail: turbulent white water rapids with visible current and foam
dense forested shoreline close to the water's edge
prominent boulder in the middle of the rapids

segments.scene_description: The calm river gives way to rapids with turbulent white water churning around the canoe. The character paddles more actively to navigate through the faster current and around large rocks obstructing the path. The surrounding landscape is now fully forested with dense pine trees lining both banks as the canyon walls have completely receded from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed river canyon that gradually opens into a bright, expansive valley. It begins within a narrow gorge of steep granite walls, where the canoe paddles forward under a rock overhang toward a rope bridge spanning the gap. As the vessel passes beneath the bridge, the restrictive canyon walls recede and the lighting shifts dramatically from deep shadow to brilliant sunlight. The scene then expands into a wider river valley, revealing lush pine forests on the hillside as the environment opens up into a sunlit landscape.

The shot follows a continuous journey as a narrow canyon opens into a wide, sunlit valley that eventually gives way to turbulent river rapids. It begins with the river expanding into a calm stretch of water where the left canyon wall vanishes, replaced by lush, forested banks on both sides. As the character paddles steadily around scattered rocks, the remaining right canyon wall gradually fades into the distant background. The scene then shifts from these tranquil waters into a stretch of churning white water, requiring more active paddling to navigate the faster current. Finally, the landscape transforms into a dense pine forest lining both banks as the canyon walls recede completely from view.
